scope.summary: Return deterministic TLS configuration failures before address failover so the original typed cause cannot be retried into a call-timeout diagnostic.
in_scope: TLS parameter resolution, rustls configuration, wallet-key validation, and SNI selection before network I/O
A transport-attempt error type that admits only TCP I/O and prepared TLS handshake failures
A public Connection::connect regression proving malformed client-key configuration returns its typed cause without opening a TCP connection
out_of_scope: Changing retry behavior for genuine TCP or prepared TLS handshake failures
Proving a live OCI Autonomous Database wallet failure against a cloud resource
Changing TLS close-notify handling, which is tracked separately by rust-oracledb-s0se

entry_points.name: Connection::connect
entry_points.trace: At HEAD (ancestor of 880134e + d99927d), `connection_connect_returns_tls_configuration_error_without_dialling` invokes the public async Connection::connect path with a valid CA and malformed PKCS#8 client key, asserts the original typed Error::Tls private-key diagnostic, and proves a real nonblocking TCP sentinel accepted no connection. Re-run 2026-07-21: cargo test -p oracledb --lib connection_connect_returns_tls_configuration_error_without_dialling → ok.

entry_points.name: TLS preparation before transport
entry_points.trace: `tls_configuration_failure_is_typed_before_any_transport_attempt` and `f2_transport_attempt_type_only_covers_io_and_tls_handshake` pass on HEAD (re-run 2026-07-21). prepare_tls_handshake runs before the address loop; configuration/auth/wallet errors cannot be constructed as retryable per-address failures.

entry_points.name: genuine transport failover
entry_points.trace: `connect_all_addresses_failed_when_every_address_refuses` passes on HEAD (re-run 2026-07-21) and proves genuine TCP refusal still traverses the address list and surfaces Error::AllAddressesFailed; commit 880134e moved only deterministic ClientConfig, wallet-key, and SNI preparation out of that retry path.

limitations: No cloud or live Oracle endpoint was contacted: the discriminating defect is pre-network and is proved by a deterministic local TCP sentinel plus a committed synthetic wallet fixture.
No exact-SHA Required proof or live artifact is committed for d99927d0723ecae10a732a9f89ebeab76af75445; this is not-ready and records scoped local regression evidence only.
